title: ferray-ufunc: comparison ops don't broadcast and return same-D instead of IxDyn
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's comparison ufuncs (equal, less, greater, etc.) broadcast automatically and return boolean arrays. ferray-ufunc's comparison ops require same shape and same D. There's no way to compare an Ix2 array against an Ix1 array. Add broadcasting comparison variants, matching the pattern used for add_broadcast/subtract_broadcast. Also consider making the default comparison functions broadcast like NumPy does, since comparison with broadcasting is one of the most common NumPy patterns (arr > threshold where threshold is a scalar or lower-rank array).
